full_text:
Li Yi (Guoyou) 李翼 (國祐)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Yi (李翼), styledGuoyou (國祐). Joined Li Feng in plotting against Sima Shi but failed and died as a result. Li Yi was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Li Yi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
